Pre-orders, starting at $79.99, are already live, fueling demand for more content.","date":"8 days ago"},{"url":"https://games.gg/grand-theft-auto-vi/guides/when-is-gta-6-trailer-3-coming-out/","title":"When Is GTA 6 Trailer 3 Coming Out? | GAMES.GG","content":"No confirmed date yet, but Trailer 3 may drop June 25 alongside GTA 6 pre-orders.
Grand Theft Auto 6 is locked in for a November release, and the entire industry is already clearing the calendar around it.
Rockstar has confirmed pre-orders go live on June 25, revealed the official box art, and started ramping up their summer marketing push.
Here's everything known right now about when Trailer 3 might drop and what it could actually show.
As of today, Rockstar has not announced a release date for GTA 6 Trailer 3.
That said, the pre-order announcement on June 25 has become the most talked-about candidate for a trailer drop.
Pre-orders for GTA 6 go live on June 25 for PS5 and Xbox Series X|S.
Check out the GTA 6 pre-order guide to make sure you're ready to lock in your copy.
The studio could open pre-orders on June 25 without releasing a single frame of new footage and still sell millions of copies before the week is out.
That's just the reality of how much anticipation surrounds Grand Theft Auto 6.
The strongest theory right now points to June 25 as the release date for Trailer 3, timed to coincide with pre-orders going live.
Keep an eye on Rockstar's official social channels on June 25.
A third trailer that grounds the experience in what you'll actually be doing for 60-plus hours would close the gap between hype and genuine understanding of the game.
The short version: no confirmed date, but June 25 is the best guess available right now.
In the meantime, browse the full GTA 6 guides collection to stay across everything else known about the game ahead of its November launch."},{"url":"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games","content":"PlayStation 5Xbox Series X|S
